suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When authoring fix features, align prescribed module touchpoints with architecture responsibilities (for example, matching mutates resting order state while settlement handles transfers).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix-store-locked-amount-per-order spec directed a settlement mutation for locked order state, while the implemented fix correctly updates state in matching.move where resting orders are mutated.

rejectedObservations.observation: Require explicit fee-config transition regression tests for lock/unlock accounting fixes in move-worker guidance.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented in .factory/validation/contracts/scrutiny/synthesis.round4.json and not newly actionable within this run
